name: Crazy Snow Skier: Platformer
description: Slide through icy slopes, collect coins , upgrade your speed and buy hearts ! Face 10 increasingly difficult levels . Avoid crushing metal blocks and bats —they’ll cost you a heart! Out of hearts? Game over. Your goal: reach the finish flag —but no signs, no hints! Explore & survive on your own.
instructions: Desktop Gameplay To Play the Game - To Go Right -- gt A - To Go Left -- gt D - To Jump -- gt W
